info.title: SlashMyBill DatabaseStorage Actions
info.description: DatabaseStorage action group for SlashMyBill Bedrock Agent - provides vendor-neutral database and storage resource visibility

post.summary: List database instances with status and configuration
post.description: Returns all database instances for the connected account including engine type, instance class, storage size, and availability configuration

parameters.name: memberEmail
parameters.description: The member email address for account resolution

schema.description: The member email address for account resolution

200.description: Database instances response with normalized instance data

post.summary: List block storage volumes with attachment status
post.description: Returns all block storage volumes for the connected account including volume type, size, state, and whether the volume is attached to a compute instance

parameters.name: memberEmail
parameters.description: The member email address for account resolution

schema.description: The member email address for account resolution

200.description: Storage volumes response with normalized volume data

post.summary: List object storage buckets and containers
post.description: Returns all object storage buckets or containers for the connected account including lifecycle policy status and storage configuration

parameters.name: memberEmail
parameters.description: The member email address for account resolution

schema.description: The member email address for account resolution

200.description: Object storage response with normalized bucket/container data
